name: Propaganda OS — Onboarding Agent v2
_description: Hybrid agentic onboarding flow. Webhook receives run_id + url + context + optional offer. Phases: research → synthesize → generate → deploy. Updates onboarding_runs.status + raw_artifacts as it goes. Frontend at 29-onboarding-agent.html polls for progress.

nodes._comment: PHASE A — Research agent. Anthropic Opus 4.7 with web_search + scrape tools. Loops until research is done.
nodes.name: Set status: researching

nodes._comment: Call Anthropic Messages API with system prompt from skills/market-research/system-prompt.md. Include the SKILL.md content as part of the system prompt or first user message. Use Anthropic native web_search + a custom scrape_url tool.
nodes.name: Anthropic: research agent

nodes._comment: Parse Anthropic response. The agent returns the research JSON in the last text block.
nodes.name: Parse research JSON

nodes._comment: Persist research artifacts to Supabase: competitors, customer_voice, obstacles, headline_bank, icps, brand_profile, offer_contexts pain/desire arrays.
nodes.name: Build artifact rows

nodes._comment: Bulk POST artifacts to Supabase. Implement as a Loop or sub-flow per table. Each POST uses service_role key.

parameters._note: Alternatively call /rest/v1/{table} individually with the row arrays. Easier is a single RPC that takes the bundle. Optional optimization.

nodes.name: Persist research rows (or split per table)

nodes._comment: PHASE C — LP generator. Pass the synthesis package into the DR-lander skill prompt.
nodes.name: Anthropic: LP designer

nodes._comment: PHASE D — Vercel deploy. Create project + deploy 3 files.
nodes.name: Vercel: create deployment

nodes._comment: Insert 3 client_pages rows then PATCH onboarding_runs to done.
nodes.name: Insert client_pages

main.node: Persist research rows (or split per table)
